revision.text:
[[en:Fujiwara no Koshi]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو کوشی]][[fr:Fujiwara no Koshi]][[id:Fujiwara no Koshi]][[ja:藤原媓子]][[ko:후지와라노 고시]][[sv:Fujiwara no Koshi]][[th:ฟุจิวะระ โนะ โคชิ]][[zh:藤原媓子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0947|death_date={{death date|0979|6|29}}|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|qid=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|1=Empress of Japan}}|spouse={{ill|En'yū|qid=Q374104|1=Emperor En'yū}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Kanemichi|qid=Q578397|1=Fujiwara no Kanemichi}}|mother={{ill|Shōshi-joō|qid=Q47470131|1=Shōshi-joō}}|relatives={{ill|Fujiwara no Akimitsu|qid=Q1397587|1=Fujiwara no Akimitsu}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Asateru|qid=Q11623339|1=Fujiwara no Asamitsu}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Masamitsu|qid=Q11623358|1=Fujiwara no Masamitsu}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Tokimitsu|qid=Q15838942|1=Fujiwara no Tokimitsu}}|native_name=藤原媓子}} {{family name hatnote|Fujiwara|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|藤原こう子|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty |name = Fujiwara no Koshi
{{lang|ja|藤原媓子}} |succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} |reign = August 1, 973 – June 29, 979 |consort = yes |spouse = {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Emperor En'yū|1=Emperor En'yū}} |issue = |royal house = {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}} |father = {{ill|Fujiwara no Kanemichi|en|Fujiwara no Kanemichi|qid=Q578397|lt=Fujiwara no Kanemichi|1=Fujiwara no Kanemichi}} |mother = |birth_date = 947 |birth_place = |death_date = {{death date and age|979|6|29|947}} |death_place = |burial_date = |burial_place = |}} {{Nihongo|'''Fujiwara no Koshi'''|藤原 媓子||947 – June 29, 979}} was an {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}}. She was the consort of {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Emperor En'yū|1=Emperor En'yū}} of Japan. == Biography == She was the daughter of regent {{ill|Fujiwara no Kanemichi|en|Fujiwara no Kanemichi|qid=Q578397|lt=Fujiwara no Kanemichi|1=Fujiwara no Kanemichi}}. She was placed in the Imperial harem to benefit her father in his rivalry with his brother {{ill|Fujiwara no Kaneie|en|Fujiwara no Kaneie|qid=Q1321703|lt=Fujiwara no Kaneie|1=Fujiwara no Kaneie}} by giving birth to an heir.Paul Groner, ''[https://books.google.com/books?id=B1eVBPvvFMgC&dq=Fujiwara+no+Koshi++En%27y%C5%AB&pg=PA223 Ryåogen and Mount Hiei[: Japanese Tendai in the Tenth Century]'' She did not give birth to a Crown Prince and was replaced as an Empress by the daughter of her father's cousin and designated successor as regent, {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoritada|en|Fujiwara no Yoritada|qid=Q3090694|lt=Fujiwara no Yoritada|1=Fujiwara no Yoritada}}.Paul Groner, ''[https://books.google.com/books?id=B1eVBPvvFMgC&dq=Fujiwara+no+Koshi++En%27y%C5%AB&pg=PA223 Ryåogen and Mount Hiei[: Japanese Tendai in the Tenth Century]'' ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= [[Princess Masako (Reizei)|Princess Masako]] | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | after={{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|en|Fujiwara no Junshi|qid=Q5507517|lt=Fujiwara no Junshi|1=Fujiwara no Junshi}} | years=973–979}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Fujiwara no Koshi]] [[fa:فوجیوارا نو کوشی]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Koshi]] [[id:Fujiwara no Koshi]] [[ja:藤原媓子]] [[ko:후지와라노 고시]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Koshi]] [[th:ฟุจิวะระ โนะ โคชิ]] [[zh:藤原媓子]] {{wikidata link|Q1054835}} [[Category:947 births]] [[Category:979 deaths]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
